identity.name: Park-Pal
identity.mission: A hyper-local, peer-to-peer parking marketplace connecting homeowners with drivers.
identity.theme_strategy: Hybrid Utility - Light Mode Dominant for Map/Driving visibility, Dark Asphalt accents for Brand Identity.

usage.headings: Use Montserrat for all headers (h1-h6). Weight: Bold (700) or ExtraBold (800) for hero sections. Letter-spacing: -0.02em.
usage.body: Use Roboto for all interface text, labels, and inputs. Weight: Regular (400) or Medium (500).
usage.mono: Use JetBrains Mono or Roboto Mono for license plates and time counters.

usage_rules.primary_action: Use Safety Orange (#E67E22) for primary CTAs (Book Now, Go Active) and Map Pins.
usage_rules.chrome: Use Asphalt Grey (#34495E) for Sidebars, Headers, and Footer backgrounds.
usage_rules.surface: Use Clean White (#ECF0F1) for page backgrounds. Pure White (#FFFFFF) for Cards to create lift.
usage_rules.text: Main text should be Asphalt Grey or Dark Slate. Never pure black.

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid for Dashboards. Mobile-first single column for booking flows.
layout.spacing: Generous padding. p-4 is minimum for containers. p-6 or p-8 for cards.
layout.radius: rounded-xl (12px) for cards and inputs. rounded-full for buttons.

containers.mobile_map_sheet: Fixed bottom sheet with rounded-t-3xl shadow-2xl bg-white z-50
containers.dashboard_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#E67E22] hover:bg-[#D35400] text-white font-bold rounded-full shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-[#34495E] text-[#34495E] hover:bg-slate-50 font-semibold rounded-full

inputs.style: h-12 bg-white border-slate-300 focus:border-[#E67E22] focus:ring-[#E67E22] rounded-lg text-lg
inputs.license_plate: font-mono uppercase tracking-widest border-4 border-black/10 bg-yellow-50 text-center font-bold

map_elements.pin_active: Safety Orange (#E67E22) with pulsing ring animation.

cards.host_stat: Bento style. White bg, large number in Asphalt Grey, small label in muted grey. Icon in top right.

visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft, diffuse shadows for depth. shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.12)] for floating elements.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Minimal usage. Only subtle vertical gradients on Safety Orange buttons to add tactility.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise texture on Asphalt Grey backgrounds to prevent flatness.

hero_host.alt: Modern car parked in a clean driveway

hero_guest.alt: Happy driver using phone in car

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text on Safety Orange is White or Dark Grey depending on size. Use APCA.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-[#34495E] on all interactive elements.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44x44px for all mobile tap targets.

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install 'lucide-react' and 'framer-motion'. Configure Tailwind theme with the mapped colors.
instructions_to_main_agent.map_integration: Use 'react-leaflet' or 'react-map-gl'. If mocking, create a visually rich placeholder with the 'parking_context' image and overlay pins.
instructions_to_main_agent.mobile_first: Design for mobile viewport first. Use 'Sheet' component from Shadcn for map details.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: Add data-testid to all buttons, inputs, and cards.

universal_guidelines.avoid_generic: Do not use default Shadcn styling. Override borders and shadows.
universal_guidelines.no_gradients: Do not use dark gradients. Use solid Asphalt Grey.
universal_guidelines.spacing: Use p-6 or p-8 for internal card padding.
universal_guidelines.animation: Add micro-interactions to every button and card hover.
